summary: A very long summary paragraph that tests text wrapping behavior across multiple lines. This candidate has extensive experience in software engineering, machine learning, data science, and cloud infrastructure. They have led teams of up to 50 people and delivered projects worth over $10 million. Their expertise spans multiple domains including backend development, frontend architecture, DevOps automation, and technical leadership. Additionally, they bring deep knowledge of distributed systems, real-time data pipelines, and enterprise security compliance, making them a uniquely versatile contributor to any organization.

experience.company: Extremely Long Company Name International Holdings LLC — Enterprise Division
experience.title: Principal Staff Software Engineer & Technical Lead, Platform Infrastructure
experience.description: Lead a globally distributed team responsible for the core infrastructure platform. Oversee architecture decisions, drive technical roadmap, and manage relationships with executive stakeholders across three continents.
achievements: Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by $2.4M annually through workload right-sizing and reserved instance optimization
Designed and shipped a multi-region active-active database replication system with 99.999% uptime SLA
Established engineering-wide observability standards adopted by 200+ engineers across 15 teams
Led migration of 80 microservices from bare-metal to Kubernetes without any customer-visible downtime
Authored internal RFC process now used company-wide for all architectural decisions affecting >2 teams
Grew the platform team from 4 to 18 engineers through structured hiring and onboarding programs
Negotiated $500K vendor contract saving 30% on third-party monitoring tools
Presented at KubeCon 2023 on behalf of the company to an audience of 3,000+ engineers

experience.title: Senior Engineer
experience.description: Worked on network automation tooling for a joint R&D initiative between AT&T and Verizon. Delivered software that managed configuration of 10,000+ network devices.
achievements: Built a configuration management DSL reducing provisioning time from 4 hours to 8 minutes
Integrated with 3 legacy SOAP APIs, wrapping them in a modern REST facade
Achieved FIPS 140-2 compliance for all cryptographic operations in the toolchain

experience.title: Softwareentwickler (Software Developer)

achievements: Replaced a manual Excel-based reporting process with an automated dashboard, saving 20 hours/week
Integrated SAP ERP with a custom warehouse management system using RFC/BAPI protocols
